Arbitration

Arbitration is an Xbox Live service that supervises registered game sessions in an automated way. Arbitration enables accurate score reporting for all ranked games, including tournament matches. Before game play begins, each Xbox registers with the server. At the end of the game, each Xbox submits a complete game report containing information about all players in the session. Based on the received submissions, arbitration makes the binding decision about the final outcome of the match. In case of a dispute, arbitration looks up the past profiles of each of the players to settle the differences.

The arbitration overview is divided into the following topics.

  • Introducing Arbitration
  • Creating an Arbitrated Game Session
  • Registering for Arbitration
  • Playing an Arbitrated Event
  • Reporting Arbitrated Results
